message:
fix(doc): enable 4 previously-ignored doc tests

- screen_state.rs: real running test with alt-screen escape sequence
- chaos.rs: no_run test with correct loop for fail_n_times(3)
- tui/output_gate.rs: enable gated_write_stdout and TuiAwareWriter tests
- logging.rs: no_run test with proper fn main() return type

Doc test score: 51 pass, 0 fail, 9 ignored (was 44 pass, 3 fail, 13 ignored)
